There are no functions that modify state, send data externally, or perform any network operations beyond establishing a connection.\n\n2. **Presence of malicious or suspicious code**: None of the reports identify any obfuscated code, backdoors, or hidden behaviors. There are no assumptions about vulnerabilities that are not supported by the code content.\n\n4. **Scores assessment**:\n   - **Malware score**: All reports assign a malware score of 0, which is appropriate given the absence of malicious behavior.\n   - **Obfuscated score**: All assign 0, which is accurate; the code is straightforward and auto-generated.\n   - **Risk score**: Mostly very low (around 0.1), reflecting the minimal security risk of read-only interface code.\n\n5. **Justification for risk scores > 0.5**: None of the reports justify higher scores.
